headline: Oil is Off Its Highs But Shorting Chevron Puts Provides Good Yields
summary: Oil is off peak prices as tensions over the Iran war have subsided. As a result, oil stocks such as Chevron Corp. have dropped. But put option premiums remain high, making them attractive to short-sellers.

content.title: Oil is Off Its Highs But Shorting Chevron Puts Provides Good Yields
content.summary: Oil is off peak prices as tensions over the Iran war have subsided. As a result, oil stocks such as Chevron Corp. have dropped. But put option premiums remain high, making them attractive to short-sellers.
